rulings.Case Title: EMILY ALARCON VS. JOSE REYES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 13, 2015, line 4. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 13, 2015 Defendant to (1) present evidence of availability of funds on September 5, 2015 in the checking account from which the purported payment check was drawn; and (2) Defendant to present copy of the check. Defendant to be ready to make September and October payments due under the Settlement Agreement in the amount of $3,066.64 (certified funds or cash) if the motion is granted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardhsip; Declaration Of Teodoro Fisher In Support; Memo Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 13, 2015, line 12. Defendant's Motion fore Relief from Forfeiture Hearing Required. Unless the Defendant produces evidence in support of the motion the motion will be denied. Defendant shall produce by no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 13, 2015: (1) medical evidence of Defendant's condition; (2) commitment letters from the Family Services Agency and RADCo with a date certain regarding availability of funds; (3) proof of death of Defendant's sibling in early August 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS KOSS VS. EDEN LOBO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 13, 2015, line 7. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege compliance with of exemption from San Francisco Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SCARLET GORDON VS. CAROLYN ENNON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 13, 2015, line 8. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to shift burden. First Amended Complaint ("FAC") alleges that the operative notice was served on September 1, 2015 and gave the Defendants 3 days to vacate. Attached as Ex 2c to the FAC is a "3 Day Notice to Perform Covenants or Quit" dated September 1, 2015. Plaintiff provides no evidence that the breaches listed in September 1, 2015 Notice have not been cured. (Ex 2a also purports to be a notice to vacate, however it is a "30 day" notice and it is not alleged to be the basis for the action in the FAC). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE VS. TODD SHEPARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 13, 2015, line 9. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Summons state in capital letters "You have 5 CALENDAR DAYS after this summons and legal papers are served on you to file a written response at this court." = (501/REQ)
